title: ilex longecaudata var. longecaudata
intro: Ilex longecaudata var. longecaudata, also known as the Japanese holly, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its dark green leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds, which have been found to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Ilex longecaudata var. longecaudata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels, making it a sought-after herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Ilex longecaudata var. longecaudata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and it is also used in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties.
